one_liner: Home-health denial for 'not homebound' while the face-to-face note documents bed-to-chair existence — evidence conflict

service.description: Home health: skilled nursing weekly + OT 2x weekly, 60 days

clinical_summary: 83F with CHF (EF 25%) and severe osteoarthritis. Face-to-face encounter note states the member is 'largely bed-to-chair, requires assist of one plus a walker for any ambulation, and becomes dyspneic after 20 feet'. A utilization note from a telephonic check states the member 'attended a family barbecue last month', which the drafting reviewer cites as evidence she is not homebound.

draft_decision.rationale: Homebound status not established: member reportedly attended a social outing outside the home.
draft_decision.specific_reason: Coverage requires that you be confined to the home; information in the file indicates you were able to attend an outing outside your home, which is inconsistent with homebound status.
